mission.title: antrea: Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies
mission.description: Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current antrea deployment
steps.description:
Verify your antrea version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
helm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working antrea installation.

steps.title: Review antrea configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea
```
**Describe the problem/challenge you have**
I would like to allow ping as a ClusterNetworkPolicy.
Unfortunatelly ICMP is not supported yet.

Accept protocol: ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicy and maybe _icmpType_ to describe the ICMP code allowed.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies
steps.description:
Had another round of discussion in the community meeting. We decided not to remove `ports` field. Users are familiar with `ports` field, and the usage of ICMP is much smaller than other protocols. If users want to use ICMP or they prefer the new struct, they could choose to use `Protocols` as an advanced feature. Otherwise, they could keep using `ports`. Also, in this way, we don’t need to bump up the API version. 

``` golang
type Rule struct {
   Action    *RuleAction
   Ports

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade antrea to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade antrea:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade antrea antrea/antrea --namespace antrea
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea
helm list -n antrea
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Had another round of discussion in the community meeting. We decided not to remove `ports` field. Users are familiar with `ports` field, and the usage of ICMP is much smaller than other protocols. If users want to use ICMP or they prefer the new struct, they could choose to use `Protocols` as an advanced feature. Otherwise, they could keep using `ports`.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with antrea installed or the issue environment reproducible.
